extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jai held yellow jersey pressure on 17km Mount Buller climb, counter-attacking inside final 150m to win stage and extend GC lead to 10 seconds over BERWICK
tactical_patterns: HINDLEY countered from third wheel inside final 150m after BERWICK pulled on steep gradients, not earlier.
YATES Simon bridged with SMITH Dion as intermediary positioning, but couldn't follow late GC acceleration on steepest ramps.
Team Sunweb massed early front control but BERWICK attacked from third wheel when gradient hit 13% Hell Corner section.

rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: conserved energy in third wheel until 150m, then accelerated on steepest inside line when rivals committed
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: launched attack but overtaken quickly when GC contenders responded, suggesting mistimed effort or insufficient form
rider_signals.PICCOLI James: neutral: reached final kilometer alone but caught with 500m remaining by GC pair
